title: tetrapterys mutabilis
intro: Tetrapterys mutabilis, also known as the Changeable Flower or Butterfly Pea, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Tetrapterys mutabilis include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or capsules, and it is also sometimes used as a natural dye due to its vibrant blue color.
